chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2161 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of M.A. No. 8919/2019 For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhatti Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G. Sindh. -------- Learned Counsel for the Petitioner files Notification dated 29th December, 2020 issued by the Chief Secretary Sindh under the cover of his statement, whereby grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed; therefore, under the instructions he does not press instant Petition. The Petition stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed Application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
